channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LaGuardia firefighter heard 'stop, stop, stop' before deadly crash but didn't know who it was for
Can a mentalist trick Trump? Oz Pearlman will try at correspondents' dinner
item.description: Mentalist hopes to unify, delight, and possibly fool the president.

item.title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
item.description: Official report does not assign responsibility but opposition accuses security forces.

item.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
item.description: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

item.title: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
item.description: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.

item.title: Gold is priced at $4,700 an ounce. Here's how to invest for under $100 now.
item.description: Gold prices are still sitting near record highs, but there are smart ways to invest with $100 or less today.

item.title: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
item.description: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.

item.title: Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
item.description: A cannabis industry group calls President Donald Trumpâs reclassification of state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug âthe most signi...

item.title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs as it charges into AI
item.description: Meta plans to lay off roughly 10% of its workforce as the technology giant steps up its spending on artificial intelligence.

item.title: Author details the spy network that took on America's post-WWII Nazi groups
item.description: In The Secret War Against Hate , Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century â and th...

item.title: Nearly 208,000 heated socks sold at Costco recalled due to burn injuries
item.description: The 32 Degrees Heated Socks can pose a burn risk due to the combination of heat, friction, moisture and pressure created during athletic activities.

item.title: Police respond to reported shooting at Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge
item.description: Police are responding to reports of a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge.

item.title: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount's $111bn takeover
item.description: The approval came as Donald Trump is to attend a dinner with billionaire Paramount backers the Ellisons.

item.title: Here's how much interest a $15,000 money market account can earn now
item.description: interest earnings on a $15,000 money market account can still be significant. Here's what savers need to know now.

item.title: Trump administration eases rules on some marijuana categories. Here's what to know
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he is immediately moving medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, which includes drugs like ketami...

item.title: Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
item.description: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fu...

item.title: How mosquitoes â and malaria â helped shape the whereabouts of early humankind
item.description: A new study looks at an unexpected force that played a critical role in shaping the lives of ancient humans.

item.title: Debris from Hurricane Helene is helping fuel Georgiaâs wildfires
